sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75497" key="o)rxipe/dh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρχῐπέδ-η</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n75497.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">restraint of the testicles,</tr_> i.e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">impotence,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.100</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphan.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
